channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Mike McCarthy won't return as the Cowboys' coach. Deion Sanders could be a candidate to replace him
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Mike McCarthy will not return as coach of the Dallas Cowboys, who are going on three decades since their last Super Bowl title, owner Jerry Jones said Monday. Jones said the organization and McCarthy mutually agreed to part ways.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Eagles fan directs vile tirade at Packers fan during wild-card game, social media video shows
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles fans are known as some of the most passionate supporters in the NFL, but one fan's behavior during a playoff game is raising eyebrows.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boxing star Tyson Fury announces retirement following losses to Oleksandr Usyk
item.description: British boxer Tyson Fury announced on Monday in a social media video he will retire from the sport of boxing following two losses to Oleksandr Usyk.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Notre Dame, Ohio State in uncharted territory: They're playing 16-game seasons for the 1st time
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — The year was 1894. Yale put together a football schedule that was daunting: Games on Wednesdays and Saturdays, basically every week from late September to late November, 16 contests in all.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hurts tosses 2 TD passes and Goedert throws 3 stiff-arms to lead Eagles past Packers 22-10
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Dallas Goedert fired one stiff arm to a Packers defender, smacked him again and then — in a sports city known for its Broad Street Bullies — dispatched one final shot to the face on his way to end zone.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lamar Jackson and Josh Allen will face off for a berth in the AFC championship game
item.description: Lamar Jackson vs. Josh Allen won’t decide the NFL MVP next week. The stakes are higher with a spot in the AFC championship game on the line.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Coaching Tracker: The Bears' search to find their next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears have assembled a six-person panel to find their next head coach, with Ryan Poles as the final decision-maker, and have requested to interview Joe Brady, Thomas Brown, Matt Campbell, Pete Carroll, Brian Flores, Marcus Freeman, Aaron Glenn, Joe Brady, and David Shaw.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: New England Patriots hire former Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as next coach; Bears had interviewed him
item.description: Vrabel, a fan favorite during eight seasons as a player in New England where he was a member of its first three Super Bowl winners and an inductee into the team’s Hall of Fame in 2023, was the preferred candidate because of his long association with the franchise and coaching success.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah State beats Boise State on 4-point play, 81-79
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The #25 Utah State men’s basketball remained perfect in league play in dramatic fashion, defeating Boise State 81-79 in the Dee Glen Smith Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohio State getting shot at 6th national title after 28-14 win over Texas in CFP semi Cotton Bowl
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Jack Sawyer had the kind of moment that will live on long past his playing days with Ohio State. Of course, one more victory would make it that much sweeter.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blue Jays add All-Star reliever Jeff Hoffman with $33 million, 3-year contract
item.description: All-Star reliever Jeff Hoffman and the Toronto Blue Jays have agreed to a $33 million, three-year contract.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LA Rams head for Arizona and a crucial playoff game with their minds on their fire-ravaged hometown
item.description: The Los Angeles Rams wrapped up practice at their training complex Friday under blue skies with bruise-colored clouds of wildfire smoke lurking on the horizon.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Notre Dame secures spot in the CFP National Championship after win over Penn State
item.description: Notre Dame has secured a spot in the College Football Playoff National Championship game after defeating Penn State 27-24 in the Orange Bowl on Thursday night. This is a breaking news update, the original story can be found below. No. 3 Notre Dame (13-1, CFP No. 7 seed) vs. No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Here's how much it will cost to (possibly) see Messi play in San Jose
item.description: (KRON) -- Tickets for the San Jose Earthquakes' home match against Inter Miami went on sale Thursday. The match offers a potential chance for Bay Area soccer fans to see Miami and Argentina star Lionel Messi in action.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: 6 Bulls earn CSC Academic All-District honors
item.description: The University of South Florida football program had six student-athletes earn recognition on the 2024 Academic All-District Football Team.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, USF Associate AD, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bears interview Mike Vrabel for head coaching position; Iowa State's Matt Campbell also comes up, report says
item.description: The Bears interviewed former Tennessee Titans head coach Mike Vrabel for their head coaching job on Wednesday, which was not unexpected. But a name from the college ranks that has now come up, according to a Chicago Tribune report, certainly wasn't on the radar of NFL coaching carousel pundits.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Connor Bedard continues hot stretch, career-best point streak at 8 games as Blackhawks beat Avalanche
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Connor Bedard is on a hot streak, even if the Blackhawks haven't been too hot lately. Bedard continued his roll on Wednesday night with a goal and an assist, and this time it led to a win, as the Blackhawks beat the Colorado Avalanche, 3-1, at the United Center.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Giants agree to deal with Justin Verlander: reports
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants are adding former MVP Justin Verlander to their pitching staff, multiple outlets reported Tuesday. The team reportedly agreed to a one-year deal with the pitcher. Verlander, 41, is one of the best pitchers of the 2000s and a future Hall of Famer.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: CMU Women's wrestler Marissa Gallegos reflects on wrestling journey
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Marissa Gallegos is no stranger to the spotlight. The Colorado Mesa University star has cemented her legacy as the winningest women’s wrestler in program history. Her career, defined by grit, dominance, and determination, has inspired athletes across the sport.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5
